posts.text: Iranian officials have told the mediators — Pakistan, Egypt and Turkey — that U.S. military movements and Trump's decision to deploy major troop reinforcements have increased their suspicion that his proposal for peace talks is just a ruse: Axios
posts.author: zerohedge

posts.text: America has no easy way to reopen the Strait of Hormuz. But Iran may not be able to force Donald Trump to end the war by keeping it shut https://www.economist.com/middle-east-and-africa/2026/03/15/the-iran-war-may-be-about-to-escalate?taid=69c36bd7320935000125996c&utm_campaign=editorial-social&utm_content=discovery.content&utm_medium=social-media.content.np&utm_source=twitter
posts.author: TheEconomist

posts.text:
BREAKING: Iranian officials have told mediators that they have now been tricked twice by President Trump and "we don't want to be fooled again," per Axios.

In the two previous rounds of talks with Iran, Trump "green lit" surprise attacks while claiming to be seeking a deal.
posts.author: KobeissiLetter

posts.text:
“Surround yourself with people who push you to do better. No drama. No negativity. Just higher goals, positive energy, and growth.”

— Warren Buffett

Your circle shapes your standard.
posts.author: BambroughKevin
